name: Oriental Beef Short Rib Barbecue
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Beef short ribs, trimmed of excess fat and cut crosswise no more than 3/8 to 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or container, combine sliced green onions, soy sauce, water, sesame oil, brown sugar, toasted sesame seeds, minced garlic, grated ginger, ground red pepper, and Szechuan peppercorns.
2. Place the beef short ribs in the marinade mixture within a plastic bag or a shallow dish, ensuring they are well coated. Seal the bag securely or cover the dish.
3. Refrigerate the marinated ribs for 4 to 6 hours, turning occasionally to ensure even coating.
4. Remove the ribs from the marinade and reserve the remaining marinade.
5. Place the ribs on the grill over medium coals.
6. Broil the ribs for 5 to 6 minutes.
7. Turn the ribs over and brush or spoon some of the reserved marinade onto them.
8. Cover the grill and continue cooking for an additional 5 to 6 minutes, or until they reach the desired level of doneness.
9. Place the cooked ribs on a serving platter. Garnish with red chili peppers, green onions, and radish roses.
10. Makes 6 servings.
